conclusion: combined (quasimetric + winner-pov-only) checkpoint is the best-known by ACPL, decisively better than the original baseline (p=5.5e-7). Quasimetric's SPECIFIC incremental contribution over winner-pov-only alone is borderline (p=0.066, CI excludes 0 but misses conventional significance) -- ACPL may not be the right instrument to detect quasimetric's hypothesized benefit (multi-hop compositional planning, not single-move safety). See KRRvKBP results for a more direct test of that hypothesis.
